name: piclaw
description: Personal pi coding agent assistant. Lightweight nanoclaw-style orchestrator using Bun and pi.

scripts.build: cd runtime && rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build:vendor:mermaid: cd runtime && bun run scripts/build-vendored-dependency.ts --manifest vendor-manifests/beautiful-mermaid.json
scripts.build:vendor:codemirror: cd runtime && bun run scripts/build-vendored-dependency.ts --manifest vendor-manifests/codemirror-editor.json
scripts.build:vendor:preact-htm: cd runtime && bun run scripts/build-vendored-dependency.ts --manifest vendor-manifests/preact-htm.json
scripts.build:vendor:marked: cd runtime && bun run scripts/build-vendored-dependency.ts --manifest vendor-manifests/marked-global.json
scripts.build:vendor:katex: cd runtime && bun run scripts/build-vendored-dependency.ts --manifest vendor-manifests/katex-global.json
scripts.build:vendor:ghostty-web: cd runtime && bun run scripts/build-vendored-dependency.ts --manifest vendor-manifests/ghostty-web.json
scripts.build:vendor:d3-mindmap: cd runtime && bun run scripts/build-vendored-dependency.ts --manifest vendor-manifests/d3-mindmap.json
scripts.build:vendor:js-yaml: cd runtime && bun run scripts/build-vendored-dependency.ts --manifest vendor-manifests/js-yaml.json
scripts.build:vendor: bun run build:vendor:mermaid && bun run build:vendor:codemirror && bun run build:vendor:preact-htm && bun run build:vendor:marked && bun run build:vendor:katex && bun run build:vendor:katex-assets && bun run build:vendor:terminal-fonts && bun run build:vendor:ghostty-web && bun run build:vendor:remote-display-decoder && bun run build:vendor:office-viewer && bun run build:vendor:drawio && bun run build:vendor:d3-mindmap && bun run build:vendor:js-yaml && bun run build:vendor:mindmap-editor && bun run build:vendor:kanban-editor
scripts.update:vendor:mermaid: cd runtime && bun run scripts/update-vendored-dependency.ts --manifest vendor-manifests/beautiful-mermaid.json
scripts.build:web: bun run build:vendor && cd runtime && rm -rf web/static/dist && mkdir -p web/static/dist && bun build web/src/app.ts web/src/login.ts --target=browser --format=esm --minify --sourcemap --outdir web/static/dist --entry-naming="[name].bundle.js" && bun build extensions/editor/editor-extension.ts --target=browser --format=esm --minify --sourcemap --external /editor-vendor/codemirror.js --outdir web/static/dist --entry-naming="editor.bundle.js" && bun build web/src/styles/app.css web/src/styles/login.css --target=browser --minify --sourcemap --outdir web/static/dist --entry-naming="[name].bundle.css" && rm -rf web/static/js/components web/static/js/utils web/static/js/ui && rm -f web/static/js/app.js web/static/js/api.js web/static/js/markdown.js && bun run scripts/stamp-cache-buster.ts
scripts.test:optional:browser-isolation: cd runtime && PICLAW_DB_IN_MEMORY=1 PICLAW_RUN_OPTIONAL_BROWSER_TESTS=1 bun test --max-concurrency=1 --timeout=30000 test/channels/web/browser-chat-isolation.optional.test.ts
scripts.quality: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run check:pack-hygiene && bun run check:stale-dist && bun run check:import-boundaries && bun run check:unused-exports && bun run check:hook-tdz && bun run check:silent-swallows
